title: Neck Injuries and Disorders
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives unless reuse terms are confirmed for the exact content.
supports: Neck pain may come from muscles, joints, discs, nerves, or injuries.
Home care may include rest, gentle activity, and clinician-directed pain control.
Warning signs include neurologic symptoms, severe or worsening pain, fever, trauma, or other serious disease concern.
Clinician assessment determines whether imaging, specialist care, or a different pathway is needed.
